subtitle.ja: はじめの構えから始めます。両手の中指に手のひらの糸をかけます
subtitle.en: Begin in "Position 1." Place the palm strings onto both middle fingers.

subtitle.ja: 左右の人差し指と薬指で、反対側の手のひらの糸を取り合います。10本の指全てに糸がかかった状態になります
subtitle.en: With both index and ring fingers, pick up the opposite palm strings, so that all ten fingers hold strings.

subtitle.ja: 親指の輪に4本の指を上から入れ、親指手前の糸を取ります。取った糸は手首向こう側に落ちます
subtitle.en: Insert all four fingers from above into the thumb loops and move over and pick down the near thumb strings; the taken strings fall away naturally to the far wrists.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指で人差し指手前下の糸を上から押さえ、全ての糸の下を通して小指向こう側下の糸を親指の背で取ります
subtitle.en: With both thumbs, press down the near lower index strings, pass under all the strings, and with the backs of the thumbs move over and pick down the far lower little-finger strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の手の甲にかかっている糸を外し、指先を向こう側に向けて完成です
subtitle.en: Release the strings lying on the backs of both hands and turn the fingertips away to show the finished figure.

subtitle.ja: 人差し指から輪を外すと、家の屋根が壊れます
subtitle.en: When the loops are released from the index fingers, the roof of the house collapses.

subtitle.ja: 中指から輪を外すと、家が修復します
subtitle.en: When the loops are released from the middle fingers, the house is restored.

subtitle.ja: 薬指から輪を外すと、再び家の屋根が壊れて住人が逃げ出します
subtitle.en: When the loops are released from the ring fingers, the roof collapses again and the occupants flee.
